name: Molasses Cookies Amish
recipeInstructions: This recipe is from an Amish cookbook. To prepare, first cream the shortening and sugar together. Then add the eggs, molasses, and syrup. Sift together the dry ingredients (baking soda, ginger, cinnamon, and flour). Alternately stir in the flour and milk until combined. Bake for 5 to 8 minutes at 375°F (175°C) in an oven. Due to the high concentration of molasses, these cookies can burn quickly; check them often. The recipe yields approximately 80 cookies and can be halved if desired.
